summary: Completed all 9 plan items (1 prerequisite + 8 TDD steps) in a single iteration. Created directory structure (autopilot/prompts/ with .gitkeep, tests/ with conftest.py). Wrote 4 failing test files then 4 prompt template implementations: activity_label.md (Stage 2, Claude Sonnet), narrative_planner.md (Stage 3, Claude Opus, 6 creator placeholders), script_writer.md (Stage 4, Claude Opus), edit_planner.md (Stage 5, Claude Opus, 8 tool-use schemas). All 46 tests pass.
